rules.name: Navigate_to_Certificate_Approve_or_Reject
rules.label: Navigate to Certificate - Approve or Reject

fields.name: candidateDetails
fields.fieldText:
Document Type: {!documentSubmission.Certificate_Name__c}

Branch: {!documentSubmission.Candidate_Branch_Name__c}

Candidate Classification: {!Get_Candidate.Classification__c}

Speciality Skills: {!skillsVAR}

fields.name: candidateDetailsTwos
fields.fieldText: Recent Work Locations: {!Get_Candidate.Recent_Wok_Site__c}

fields.name: HelpB
fields.fieldText: No Document Found. Please Navigate to the Certificate to manually Approve or Reject.

subflows.name: X1218_Sub_Flow_to_Get_the_Email_Template
subflows.label: 1218 - Sub Flow to Get the Email Template
